home.headline: Quiet care in the heart of Istanbul
home.support: A private polyclinic for aesthetics, hair, and medical wellness.

about.title: A polyclinic built for calm, considered care
about.lead: KMA PolyClinic grew from Kimia Estetik into a multi-specialty private clinic in Torun Center, Istanbul — still intimate, now broader.
about.story: What began as a focused aesthetics practice matured into KMA PolyClinic: dermatology, dentistry, plastic surgery, hair and eyebrow restoration, and medical wellness under one discreet roof. We kept the same standard of personal attention while expanding the medicine around it.
about.trust: Patients choose us for measured recommendations, clear communication across languages, and a setting that feels private rather than promotional. Care plans are paced — never rushed into trends.
about.position: We are not a single-procedure boutique. KMA is a Quiet Luxury polyclinic: aesthetics-led, medically grounded, and designed for guests who value composure as much as clinical skill.

contact.title: Book an appointment
